Write the Product Property in your own words. Does it apply to each of the following? $$\text{log}_{a} 5 x ,$$ $$\text{log}_{a} ( 5 + x ) .$$ Why or why not?
Write the Power Property in your own words. Does it apply to each of the following? $$\text{log}_{a} x^{p} ,$$ $$( \text{log}_{a} x )^{r} .$$ Why or why not?
Use an example to show that $$\text{log} ( a + b ) \ne \text{log} a + \text{log} b .$$
Explain how to find the value of $$\text{log}_{7} 15$$ using your calculator.
